programme.desc: A boy wakes up in an ascending elevator with no memory of who he is or how he got there. He joins a group of other boys trapped in an enclosed area surrounded by an enormous maze. His only hope for escape is by piecing together clues about his past.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: In the future, the Capitol selects a boy and a girl from the twelve districts to fight to the death on television. Katniss volunteers to take her sister's place for the latest match.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: After unwittingly starting a rebellion against the Capitol with their actions in the 74th Hunger Games, Katniss and Peeta have large targets on their backs.

programme.title: Movie: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Part 1

programme.title: Movie: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter, who has suffered a string of bad luck, learns that his next target is his ex-wife, who jumped bail in order to follow a lead on a murder case.

programme.title: Movie: Beauty and the Beast

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic

programme.title: Movie: Joyful Noise
programme.desc: As they prepare for an upcoming national championship, two choir directors face off for control.

programme.title: Movie: The Ugly Truth

programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Get Rich or Die Flyin'
programme.desc: With three assets and three million bucks on the table, Kevin is looking at one of the most complex missions of his career. To pull it off, Kevin calls in Mike Kennedy. Meanwhile, Ken and Danny hunt down a one million dollar race boat.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Hired Guns
programme.desc: Ken Cage and Danny Thompson repo a tour bus. Kevin Lacey faces armed guards on a nighttime repo, and Mike Kennedy is caught in a gun-smuggling operation.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Rat Race
programme.desc: Ken and Danny must race to beat out rival repo men on the biggest yacht heist of their careers. Mike finds himself in a high stakes game of 'chicken' between a six million dollar Lear jet and a Lamborghini.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Guns, Girls and Gamblers
programme.desc: Mike and his wife Valerie crash a high-stakes poker game to learn the location of a jet. Ken and Danny hunt down the luxury yacht of a womanizing sleaze bag. And Kevin has his life threatened when he attempts to repo a debtor's crop duster.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo 911
programme.desc: Kevin poses as an interviewer to gain access to a Westwind jet, Ken and Danny valet a car to get the keys to a Cessna CJ3, and Mike repos an air ambulance, but not before he rescues their final lifesaving mission.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Ken Gets Played
programme.desc: A debtor suddenly swipes the helicopter that Ken and Danny were only seconds away from repossessing. Mike Kennedy enlists the help of his wife, Valerie, in a daring plot to seize a charter jet. Kevin is swarmed by FBI agents after an exhausting repo.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Frozen Out
programme.desc: Oliver's refusal to help prep fish is the last straw for Andrew and Jennifer, so the outpost founders push the others to force Oliver out. A sudden temperature plunge cuts Adam and Evan's bear hunt short. Winter's coming but the group is far from ready.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Gas Explosion, Jet Engine
programme.desc: A gas station explodes; dozens of twisters take aim at three states and a landmark.

programme.title: Jimmy Houston Outdoors: Alligator Gar
programme.desc: Jimmy goes fishing for alligator gar.

programme.title: Seasons on the Fly: Kvichak Trout at Seasons on the Fly Lodge
programme.desc: We're fishing for giant trout at Seasons On The Fly Lodge on Alaska's Kvichak River.

programme.title: Destroyed in Seconds: Car vs. Bakery, BASE Jumper
programme.desc: A bakery is hit twice by out of control cars; an historical building collapses suddenly; a base jumper takes a hard hit.

programme.title: The Fish Guyz: Post-Storm Fortune
programme.desc: Smiling Bob's Fish Dip and Tonio's Seafood Shack and Tiki Bar are visited.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Jason Van Camp
programme.desc: Jason Van Camp, who has many titles, goes fishing at the Pineview Reservoir in the Mountains of Utah.

programme.title: George Poveromo's World of Saltwater Fishing: Marathon, Florida Keys: Patches, Reefs and Wrecks
programme.desc: George targets bottom and pelagic species off Marathon, Florida Keys.

programme.title: Sportfishing Adventures: Islamorada Backcountry
programme.desc: Capt. Steve Teijea guides Rick through the backcountry of the Florida Keys.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: The Million Dollar Claim
programme.desc: When the pandemic puts Dave Turin's Alaskan mining dream on hold, he mobilizes his team to prospect in Arizona, Montana and Colorado. When all seems lost, they ultimately discover an abandoned claim that holds their best shot at a major gold yet.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Attack or Retreat
programme.desc: After a key piece of equipment dies, Fred decides if it's time to pull the plug. Parker's crew struggle to keep up their breakneck pace when a conveyor belt goes down. Rick prospects some of the richest ground he's ever mined.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Marty tackles an off-grid hydropower system. Matt creates a meat smoker. One of the Raneys is injured in a surprise accident.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Ozark Mountain Misery
programme.desc: The Raney family goes to the Ozarks, where Marty spent his childhood homesteading, and discovers a malnourished couple and a mouldy cabin that's making them sick. Massive electric storms hit, but the homestead must be built before Mother Nature wins.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Arachnid Overload
programme.desc: A survival-savvy yoga teacher and a custom knife maker tackle the brutal jungle of Colombia. Their primitive survival skills are impressive, but the deadly spiders and tics test both their courage and resilience, threatening to take them down.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Trying to Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Deep in Mexico's Baja desert lies the scorching wasteland of the Devil's Canyon. A Canadian mountain man teams up with an experienced homesteader to take on the canyon's triple-digit heat, scarce water, and venomous predators.

programme.title: Unexpected: Catching Up With Hailey 1
programme.desc: Tiarra hears the Matthew drama when she gets together with Hailey. Taron threatens to take Reanna to court to see his baby. Myrka and Ethan prepare for an extravagant gender reveal party. Jenna's dad refuses to let her mom be a part of the baby shower.

programme.title: Unexpected: Fighting With Your Mom on Social Media
programme.desc: Myrka and Liliana have a blowout fight over social media. Jenna gives her parents an ultimatum -- get along at the baby shower. Reanna and Taron sit down with their moms to sort out custody. Tyra gets stuck in a storm on the way to see Alex and Layla.

programme.title: Unexpected: C-Section in Jeopardy
programme.desc: Myrka attends her last sonogram appointment alone due to COVID-19. Reanna's planned C-section may be in jeopardy. Lilly is pregnant with her second child. Tyra and Alex go on their first date in over a year.

programme.title: Unexpected: The Circumcision Conversation
programme.desc: Reanna gives birth during a pandemic. Jenna and Aden fight over the baby shower. Tyra has a little too much fun on her cheerleading trip in Miami, Florida. A debate over circumcision makes Lilly and Lawrence's family dinner awkward.

programme.title: Sister Wives: More to Love: Being Strong or Being a Bitch
programme.desc: Janelle gathers Kody and the wives to talk about their increasingly tense family dynamic. Kody gets honest and says he doesn't want to advocate for polygamy anymore, and Robyn and Christine open up about their own insecurities as they question everything.

programme.title: Sister Wives: More to Love: Felons No More
programme.desc: The Browns visit their polygamist friends to discuss the sudden and exciting possibility that polygamy will be decriminalized in Utah. The car trip to get there is a mess, but once there, the excitement is palpable.

programme.title: Sister Wives: More to Love: Robyn the Peacemaker
programme.desc: Mariah and Audrey are in town and share an exciting announcement with the family. Robyn tries to help Kody patch things up with Meri after their big fight on the property, but Kody pushes back and doesn't seem interested in fixing things.

programme.title: Sister Wives: More to Love: The Basement Wife
programme.desc: Robyn questions why Christine said the family 'hates' her when they all gather. Mariah and Audrey look at wedding venues, and they say that anyone who disapproves of their same-sex marriage isn't invited. Then, COVID-19 fears sweep the country.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Under the Knife
programme.desc: Amy undergoes gastric bypass surgery to change her life, but endangers herself by not sticking to the post-op diet. Tammy seeks support from her love interest, Jerry. Two months later, the sisters reveal the changes they've made to family and friends.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Life-Altering News
programme.desc: While Amy reaps the benefits of weight-loss surgery, her sister Tammy worries that she gained weight during quarantine. A visit to urgent care gives Amy life-changing news. Tammy's family confronts her over her health.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Tippin' the Scales
programme.desc: The Slatons head back to Atlanta to see Dr. Procter. Amy is worried about dropping the news that she got pregnant so soon after surgery, against doctor's orders. Tammy returns knowing she's gained all the weight back.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wake-Up Call
programme.desc: Tammy and Amy blame each other for their issues in therapy. When Tammy gets devastating news from Dr. Procter, her brother Chris makes a life-altering decision. A very pregnant Amy can't stop overeating, and the results are disastrous.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: A Fork in the Road
programme.desc: The Slatons are shocked by the cause of Amy's trip to the emergency room. Chris and Tammy see a new doctor, where Tammy must step on the scale again after a month of not sticking to her diet.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Dropping Bombs
programme.desc: Tammy's new doctor gives her what feels like an insurmountable weight goal, but it's not the only challenge she's facing. Amy and Michael drop a bomb that changes everything.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: There's Something About Jerry
programme.desc: Tammy's boyfriend, Jerry, comes to visit just in time to celebrate the sisters' favorite holiday: Halloween. Tammy's sister Misty, however, questions Jerry's intentions. Amy has to face another weigh-in after her concerning appointment with Dr. Procter.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Jerry Bites Back
programme.desc: Amy counts down the days until her delivery with an eccentric photo shoot, while the family worries that Jerry is derailing Tammy's diet. Tammy reveals her big secret to Jerry.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Everybody Hurts
programme.desc: When Tammy and Amy go see a psychic, they both get disturbing news. The family rallies together, and they are willing to try anything to help Tammy lose weight. Amy must face her worst fears when she's rushed to the ER.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Labor of Love
programme.desc: Amy gets unsettling news about the birth of her baby as her high-risk pregnancy has last-minute complications. With their next weigh-in ahead of them, Chris and Tammy are cautiously optimistic until Tammy steps on the scale.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Do or Die
programme.desc: Recovering from COVID-19, Tammy now needs constant oxygen, and her weight spirals. Chris faces his final weigh-in, and Amy makes a big decision about her future. With Tammy's romance heating up, the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches
programme.desc: Ron Funches has a new healthy lifestyle, but he's willing to make an exception for Wendy's spicy chicken sandwich. The three chefs try to replicate the sandwich to his liking.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Learn what has become a signature part of Q's wardrobe and who among the Jokers is considered the best dancer. Plus, find out which character made his first appearance on an early episode of the show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Find out which challenge became an instant classic, what act of kindness blew the crew away and what word the Jokers are responsible for in Urban Dictionary.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Psychotic Not-Line
programme.desc: Learn what phrase the cast and crew use to crack each other up, find out which Joker burned himself during a challenge and what has become a signature line in the show's opening.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Get Out of Dodge
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out which Joker used to run a business and how Rosie O'Donnell became a fan of the show. Plus, find out how Murr surprised the guys on the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Fashion
programme.desc: Find out what challenge needed to be cancelled and rescheduled three times, and why some people didn't want to be included in the show. Plus, learn what questions the guys prepared that didn't make the cut.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scaredy Cat
programme.desc: Find out which Joker almost walked out of a challenge, and what scene inspired the name of a fan's baby. Plus, learn which Joker is allergic to cats.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Down in the Dump
programme.desc: Find out what objects other than pencils the Jokers have considered putting on people, and whose sister frequently helps on the show. Plus, learn what prop has become a fan favorite.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sweat the Small Things
programme.desc: Find out what Q considers one of the worst punishments of all time, and what prank Joe often pulls on Sal when they're traveling.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Film Fail
programme.desc: Learn why the Joker film in the produce section of grocery stores, what the guys tease Murr about and why the audio team had issues recording in a medical office.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Blue Man Dupe
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal are a little too generous with fellow shoppers at the market, then ask strangers to help them out of a texting jam. Plus, the big loser fights his way, repeatedly, to the best seat in the house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Fast Foodies: Ron Funches
programme.desc: Ron Funches has a new healthy lifestyle, but he's willing to make an exception for Wendy's spicy chicken sandwich. The three chefs try to replicate the sandwich to his liking.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Eggman
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr go incognito to fool unsuspecting strangers, then pop in for a coffee just in time to miss out on a big prize. Plus, tonight's big loser might just crack under the pressure of his rotten punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Smashing Success
programme.desc: The gang learns how hard it is to find good help these days and then later returns to their artistic roots. One joker reluctantly delivers a series of crushing blows.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Alliance
programme.desc: Find out which Joker is an avid photographer, and what words the guys never want to hear before filming a punishment. Plus, learn which Joker is never afraid to strip down for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Enter the Dragons
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's dad has appeared on the show, and which natural disaster affected one of the challenges. Plus, learn how Sal came to own a replica of Van Halen's guitar.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Music
programme.desc: It's time to face the music, as Adam reveals the racism behind rock & roll's origins and the egregious fees of Live Nation's monopoly. He then defends musicians who 'sell out' to make a living in today's digital landscape.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Himself
programme.desc: In the season finale, Adam battles with his inner self-doubt over how biases affect the show. He then explores the shortcomings of storytelling and the influence (or lack thereof) of advertising on the integrity of the series.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reboots a living skeleton, an instant pet trap, a flipping mermaid and more, all with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Locked Booth

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper

programme.desc: Guy Fieri is checking out cuisine in capital cities, starting in Juneau, Alaska, at an Italian spot with an Alaskan twist pairing pappardelle with king crab. In Richmond, a classic deli cookin' modern tastes like duck pierogis and Jewish egg rolls.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Guy travels to places where things are still done the old-fashioned way. In Oklahoma City, a steak house has been serving the same menu items for more than 80 years.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pound Cake to Pot Pie
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's pullin' in for a mishmash of comfort food. In Philadelphia, the low country joint dishing out unique North African chicken and sour cream pound cake.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Worldwide Delivery
programme.desc: On the takeout menu today is Roman-style pizza from Arizona, a wicked-hot burger from Boston, Hawaiian surf and turf and Trinidadian specialities out of Seattle.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: From Sausage to Saltfish
programme.desc: Guy Fieri heads back to a Portland, OR, sausage maker for pepperoni. An Oklahoma City meat-and-three serves up fried ribs and old-fashioned oxtail, and a Jamaican joint in Miami has everything from saltfish to spicy hot hand pies.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From the Heart
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting up some spots putting their heart and soul into everything they do. In Carlsbad, Calif., a family-owned Italian joint is staying true to a long-standing ravioli recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Family Time
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's visiting some families keeping it real in the kitchen in Nashville.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hitting the Grill
programme.desc: Guy samples foods straight off the grill, including a burger joint in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Nashville Food Project
programme.desc: Trisha and her sister Beth put together a meal for the Nashville Food Project, a local organization that brings communities together to help alleviate hunger.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Sharpen Up!
programme.desc: Home cooks want to sharpen up their knife skills, and get some advice from Trisha.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Bringing The Outdoors In
programme.desc: Valerie combines cuisine with camping for a festive picnic.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Valerie Bertinelli: Ingredient Hunter!
programme.desc: Valerie finds inspiration wherever she looks, including her local farm stand. Valerie finds ingredients for a plum slab pie, summer vegetable gratin, spicy cucumber calamari salad with spiced yogurt sauce, and a boozy frozen espresso.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: New Favorites
programme.desc: For Ree Drummond, it's out with the old and in with new favorites that are all quick and easy. She makes over a cowboy classic, Flank Steak with Herb Sauce and Three-Cheese Waffle Hash Browns.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Pie's the Limit
programme.desc: Ree's in a pie state of mind, so she starts by making an incredibly decadent and party-worthy double chocolate pie with a torched meringue topping. Then she shares a waffle cone ice cream pie and a selection of six mini pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Ask Me Anything Wildcard
programme.desc: Ree Drummond answers wildcard questions from friends, townsfolk and visitors to Pawhuska. She shares an over-the-top good seared rib eye Banh Mi Vietnamese sandwich and an awesome chicken quinoa bowl with roasted corn salsa.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Drummond Comfort
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is on the ranch cooking up family favorites with the help of a soon-to-be-married crew. There's got to be soup, Tuscan with chicken, to be exact. She also makes a tasty casserole with cheesy greens and fried crispy potato balls.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Fun Italian Feast
programme.desc: Molly Yeh whips up a fun Italian feast for the whole family, starting with her cheesy smashed meatball burgers. She also makes a colorful antipasto salad with prosciutto-wrapped breadsticks, a crispy parmesan fried onion and spumoni cake jars for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm Fry Dinner
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is having a fry-out on the farm, and things are getting deliciously crispy. She makes juicy buttermilk fried chicken, a roasted broccoli and grape salad and colorful harissa carrots and ranch.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Hutchinson House Dinner
programme.desc: Kardea Brown hosts a traditional Southern fish fry for a fundraiser to benefit the Hutchinson House. The dinner features fried cornmeal crusted catfish and loaded baked potato salad. For dessert, Kardea bakes an old-fashioned lemon buttermilk pie.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Light Low Country
programme.desc: Kardea is having two special guests over for dinner -- her mom and grandma! Since her grandma is watching what she eats, Kardea prepares a meal that's deliciously Southern without breaking the calorie counter.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Classics Worth Cooking
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts are breaking down the classic dishes that every home cook can master in their own kitchens. There's no-fail whole roasted chicken, salad nicoise, a t-bone steak with easy bearnaise sauce and chili orange chocolate souffle for dessert.

programme.title: The Great Food Truck Race: Battle for the North
programme.desc: In the wilds of Alaska, seven aspiring food truck teams kick off the biggest, boldest season of the Great Food Truck Race. On Flattop Mountain overlooking Anchorage, Tyler Florence welcomes the teams to the competition.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Breakfast, Lunch and Brunch
programme.desc: On this road trip revisit, Guy Fieri pops by an Oklahoma City diner known for their onion burgers. Then, a Baltimore brunch spot is stepping up their grit game, and a quirky joint in Los Angeles is still putting a spin on their diner dishes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Beef, Barbecue And Bar Food
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's trip is all about the three B's: beef, barbecue and bar food. First, he stops in Taylor, Texas, at one of the first DDD barbecue joints to pay homage to an old friend whose son is carrying on his legacy.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Where's the Beef?
programme.desc: It's all about the beef on this trip as Guy Fieri pops into a classic diner in Marietta, Georgia, for a taste of what's topping the charts these days. Next, it's on to San Antonio where a carwash-laundromat-kitchen combo is crankin' out killer burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers and Dogs
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits classic burger and hot dog joints including: a Baltimore spot for Coney dogs from an 80 year old recipe; an Austin, TX, eatery known for Serrano peppers and hot buffalo sauce burgers; and a Minneapolis dog and burger dive.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Escaping Death
programme.desc: When an aggressive dog is in danger of being put down, Tia heads to South Carolina to save him. A couple from Florida comes to VRC hoping to find a dog that will enjoy retired life with them. Parolee Toney Converse takes on more responsibility.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: One Man's Treasure
programme.desc: Toney and Earl rescue an aggressive dog found tied up in front of an abandoned home. Tia and Lizzy escort a pit bull to its potential forever home in New Jersey, while Mariah helps a deserted canine struggling with neurological issues.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Tia's Favorites: Shelter Rescues
programme.desc: Tia shares some of her favorite shelter rescues in VRC history. From a pack of dog-fighting canines getting a second chance, to a rescue mission for a dog facing death row, and Tia racing to help a rural shelter on the verge of shutting down.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Blindsided
programme.desc: After a dog is shot, Tia races to save his life. Then, Matt and Lizzy scramble to rescue a scared and sick puppy running loose on the busy roads near the warehouse. After red flags are raised during a home check, Tia faces an agonizing decision.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last Chance
programme.desc: Tia takes in several dogs from a dog fighting ring, and Cheech finally gets a chance at a forever home after years of being overlooked. Then, a Parolee uses his personal experiences to help troubled teens.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Saving Prada
programme.desc: The parolees head to Nashville to rescue a dog from death row.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Blindsided
programme.desc: After a dog is shot, Tia races to save his life. Then, Matt and Lizzy scramble to rescue a scared and sick puppy running loose on the busy roads near the warehouse. After red flags are raised during a home check, Tia faces an agonizing decision.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fire Dog
programme.desc: A potential best friend needs to pass a unique test before he can be adopted out. Parolee Jammall returns after a mysterious absence. A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog who saved their lives.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Throttle Out
programme.desc: A sledder takes a jump that lands him in the hospital and the wardens investigate the crash. The wardens chase down a group of drunk snowmobilers. A strange pile of animal parts in the snow leads the wardens to a family of poachers.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Control
programme.desc: Officers Boudreau and Hannett pursue a pair of intoxicated, out of control, teenage dirt bikers. Officer Bronson investigates a night-hunting case involving an animal he's never dealt with. And Officer Lucas gets creative trying to rescue a baby bird.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Raccoon Rescue
programme.desc: With the help of local police, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett remove campers found illegally occupying state property. An 8-year-old boy is found riding solo on an ATV, and Officer Crouse helps two raccoon cubs found on the road.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run

programme.desc: A hunter is confronted for killing a deer with a gun in bowhunting only season. A man is questioned for being in possession of venomous copperhead snakes. While checking bowhunters at night, a game warden helps find an injured hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Marshland Massacre

programme.desc: When a North Carolina preacher's wife is found murdered, police must determine not only who may want her dead, but whether some members of the congregation are mourning – or trying to cover up their part in the violent crime.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Jungles

programme.title: Planet Earth: Shallow Seas
programme.desc: A humpback whale mother and calf embark on a journey from tropical coral paradises to storm-ravaged polar seas. Indonesian coral reefs reveal seahorses, clams and sea kraits. Bull fur seals attack king penguins, and sea urchins fell forests of kelp.

programme.title: Planet Earth: Seasonal Forests

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: The Grudge
programme.desc: With her good looks and sunny demeanor, doctor's assistant and part-time model Christine Kent attracts her fair share of admirers. But after one encounter ignites jealousy and obsession, Christine is blind-sided by the devastating consequences.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Heart of Darkness

programme.desc: A chance phone call brings together an FBI crime analyst, a DOJ forensics expert and a Texas Ranger, who join forces in an attempt to gain a cold-case murder confession from convicted killer Samuel Little. They get much more than they ever imagined.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Savage Country
programme.desc: On their way to Oregon, young lovebirds Kevin Thorpe and Laura Craig come face-to-face with evil on the mountainous, desolate back roads of Northern California.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Deadly Obsession
programme.desc: Delves into real-life crime and justice cases, examining them from all angles.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Unknown Child
programme.desc: A girl is found murdered in a California restaurant parking lot. A tenacious investigator, a forensic sculptor and a report by 48 HOURS would help break the case. But identifying the girl was the first step. Would her killer be found? Harold Dow reports.

programme.title: Diabolical: Teach Me to Kill
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, a beloved father of four is found dead in his car. He's been bound, gagged, and asphyxiated. Witnesses lead detectives to a local man named John Brian Ray. But this troubled man is just a pawn in the larger game of a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: A Mystery in the Pines
programme.desc: Caught in a love triangle, young chef and mom Heather Mallory vanishes. Now Portland detectives and Heather's parents search for the truth in an investigation involving wiretaps, confidential informants and a dramatic resolution deep in the forest.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Gut Instinct
programme.desc: When a soon-to-be grandmother doesn't come home from work, her daughter knows something terrible must have happened and reports her missing. As the investigation unfolds, Lt. Joe Kenda realizes they could be dealing with a fledgling serial killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Ring
programme.desc: In 1987, Pat Postiglione is tasked with solving his first homicide: a young mother strangled to death inside her apartment. Without any viable suspects, Pat faces the daunting task of interviewing his only witness: the victim's 4-year-old daughter.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: One Hot Summer
programme.desc: 14-year-old Christie Mullins is murdered in Clintonville, Ohio. The murder is unsolved for forty years until a young woman comes forward to identify her uncle as the killer. He is revealed to have a surprising connection to his victim.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Love on the Rocks
programme.desc: In Montrose, Colorado, rock quarry owner and mother, Irene Trujillo, suddenly goes missing. When her daughter's search for their mom comes up empty, 911 is called. Those closest to Irene, including her employees, are suspected of foul play.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Alien Files
programme.desc: The final edition of the series examines a range of conspiracy theories relating to extra-terrestrials. There are those who believe that we have already made contact with aliens and that world governments are concealing this.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: El Chapo: Caught!
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera aka El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the US marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: The Mob Enforcer: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: See the story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: In 1991, the United States and an unprecedented coalition of over 30 countries join forces to liberate Kuwait from invading Iraq dictator, Saddam Hussein. Highlights from the key battles, weapons and strategies that lead to a decisive victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Fit for a King
programme.desc: Eddie tries over the top dishes kit for a king.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Let Them Eat Sweets
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson knows there's one flavor that's always exciting - sweets! It doesn't matter if it's fruity, chocolatey or pure unadulterated sugar, there are endless ways to hit the sweet spot. So get your sweet tooth ready!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: One of a Kind
programme.desc: We're talking about dishes that are unique, original and unlike anything that's come before. Alton Brown has his eye- and his stomach- set on a genuine creation called the Crab Rangoon Pizza.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Trigger Foods
programme.desc: We're losing all control and giving in to ultimate food cravings. Geoffrey Zakarian starts things off like never before with the most juicy and succulent roast chicken from New York City. Jonathon Sawyer takes it to the next level.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Baltimore and Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: There's a long line of tradition on the menu when Andrew visits Baltimore and the Chesapeake Bay.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Salt Lake City
programme.desc: Minutes away from desert trails, mountains and limitless outdoor adventures, Andrew highlights the delicious and iconic foods of Salt Lake City. Classic dishes include a pastrami burger, steak tips with mole and Utah scones.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Santa Monica
programme.desc: Andrew dives in to the laid-back eats of Santa Monica, California. Boasting miles of coastline, Santa Monica is home to spicy seafood soup, Chinese chicken salad, Tsukemen and many other dishes any seafood lover could want.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Bring the Heat
programme.desc: In Casey's years of facing off against food, he's taken on his fair share of heat. Casey's counting down the hottest, culminating in a challenge so spicy it may crack the Scoville scale and the number.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most Perfect Pork
programme.desc: Casey's eating odyssey has taken him all over the country and back again, and it's finally time to honour the best of the best. We're counting down the five most perfect pork dishes in Man v. Food history.

programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Spear!
programme.desc: As Della rebuilds her ship, Penumbra becomes convinced Della’s planning an attack. Meanwhile, Donald’s nap keeps getting interrupted by adventure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!
programme.desc: Della Duck has faced every danger the moon has to offer to reunite with her family, but her greatest challenge is one she might not be able to fight her way out of.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Duck Knight Returns!
programme.desc: When Scrooge and Dewey make a gritty Darkwing Duck movie, Launchpad teams up with the original Darkwing to stop it.

programme.title: UFC Unleashed: Stunning Submissions
programme.desc: Knowing what to do on the ground is an important aspect of MMA and knowing how to finish a fight there is even more important. See stunning submissions that showcase ground games with Elkins vs. Johnson, Puelles vs. Silva, and Condit vs. Oliveira.

programme.desc: Towelie writes a book about his experiences getting over a drug addiction. With Oprah's help, the book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around, until the dame of daytime television catches Towelie in a lie.

programme.title: South Park: The Death of Eric Cartman
programme.desc: Cartman is sure he's dead and Butters is sure that Eric Cartman's ghost is haunting him. Together they attempt to make amends to all the people Cartman has wronged over the years.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics
programme.desc: To help Cartman win the school spelling bee, Cartman's Mom gives him the Hooked on Monkey Fonics spelling system. When the boys lose to a couple of home-schooled kids, Kyle becomes enamoured with the socially awkward sister.

programme.title: South Park: The Ungroundable
programme.desc: Butters is sure he's seen a vampire at school but he can't get anyone to listen to him. Meanwhile, the Goth Kids are angry and frustrated when the other kids can't tell the difference between a Goth and a Vampire.

programme.title: South Park: AWESOM-O
programme.desc: Cartman plans to learn all of Butters' innermost secrets and then use them against him, by pretending to be Butters' new best friend, a robot named AWESOM-O.

programme.title: South Park: Chef Goes Nanners
programme.desc: Chef's passionate protest declaring the South Park flag is racist enflames the entire town, including the kids.

programme.title: South Park: Free Hat

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the 'Getting Gay with Kids' choir tour.

programme.title: South Park: My Future Self n' Me

programme.desc: The murder of a priest puts the squad on a collision course with the Catholic Church and drives a wedge between Brenda and Chief Pope. Meanwhile, Brenda's parents are in town while her father continues his cancer treatments.

programme.title: Street Outlaws vs. Fast N' Loud: Build to Mega Race Gear 2
programme.desc: The Gas Monkey team works to make sure their chassis will let the car drive straight, but weather prevents them from making any good test passes. Ryan takes a team to Arizone to test the car, but faces new trials.

programme.title: Street Outlaws vs. Fast N' Loud: Build to Mega Race Gear 3
programme.desc: The Misfits start their build but tempers flare when an argument breaks out, threatening to stall the build completely. Farmtruck and AZN work on transforming the Gonorail into a functioning vehicle, but learn that this build will take extra work.

programme.title: Street Outlaws vs. Fast N' Loud: Build to Mega Race Gear 4
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN and the Misfits complete their builds and make some test hits, but teams struggle with technical issues that must be corrected. Ryan arrives in Phoenix along with some fellow 405 racers while the Gas Monkey crew heads to Arizona to race.

programme.title: Street Outlaws vs. Fast N' Loud: The Mega Race 2
programme.desc: It's finally time for Mega Race 2, and that means that the racers from Street Outlaws, Fast N Loud and Misfit Garage are all in Arizona for the big race. It's Oklahoma vs. Texas, and these guys will do anything to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Crashes and Fast Passes

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Hot off the Pantera
programme.desc: Looking to make a smash debut at an all-new Barrett-Jackson auction in eight weeks, Richard buys into Aaron's plan to build a first-ever '72 Pantera fitted with a custom turbo-charged Ford EcoBoost V6 engine.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Pan-tera's Labyrinth
programme.desc: A last minute problem arises with the turbo-charged EcoBoost '72 Ford Pantera Aaron is building for the new Barrett-Jackson Northeast, which in turn, forces Richard to gamble by bringing his quarter-million dollar 2005 Ford GT to the auction instead.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Monkey Business Dragster
programme.desc: The guys buy a gleaming '32 Pontiac at a swap meet. A friend's 1960 Cadillac Sedan De Ville might be haunted and cursing the garage.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Frankensteined Ford
programme.desc: The guys put a '68 Ford F-100 truck together by combining parts from other cars that shouldn't go together. Rich relives his youth with a '77 Trans Am Firebird.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Cool Kingwood/ Retro Replicar
programme.desc: Aaron and crew turn an ugly duckling '71 Chevy Kingwood station wagon into the cool '70s hot rod dragster it was meant to be. Richard pries a 1980 MG Replicar from a husband reluctant to part with it. The Grill books its first musical act.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Expedition: Back to the Future
programme.desc: On an empty desert road, Doc Brown arrives with a wild request for Josh Gates: find the time machine, get it to Michael J. Fox, the future depends on it.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part I
programme.desc: Aaron and Richard find themselves a 1931 Model A to chop. What begins as a simple build quickly grows into a grand green machine. With less than a month to build this chromed out '60s show car from the ground up, Richard's wild plan may be too much.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped and Dropped Model A, Part II
programme.desc: When Richard snaps back to his senses, he puts the monkeys back on track and they must finish the '31 Chopped Model A in ten days. It doesn't go without a lot of strife. Meanwhile, Richard and Dennis argue over a Holy Grail find of a '64 ½ Mustang.

programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN bring back an epic third annual Daily Driver contest where racers show up with everything from a golf cart to a Corvette to compete for big stacks of cash.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Into Your Arms
programme.desc: Natalie panics when Mike gets cold feet. Yara wants to go home. Rebecca questions Zied's intentions. Tarik breaks Hazel's trust. Stephanie considers a future with Harris. Amira changes her mind.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Polygamists in a Pandemic
programme.desc: Kody and the wives struggle to adapt to the pandemic as a polygamous family. Robyn is terrified for her children's health, and Janelle tearfully tells Kody to stay away. As he decides where he'll quarantine, Kody teaches the kids how to save toilet paper.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Do or Die
programme.desc: Recovering from COVID-19, Tammy now needs constant oxygen, and her weight spirals. Chris faces his final weigh-in, and Amy makes a big decision about her future. With Tammy's romance heating up, the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.desc: Recovering from COVID-19, Tammy now needs constant oxygen, and her weight spirals. Chris faces his final weigh-in, and Amy makes a big decision about her future. With Tammy's romance heating up, the family takes matters into their own hands.

programme.title: Counting On: Lauren Finds Her Dress
programme.desc: The Duggars celebrate Jana and John David's 28th birthday with a family ski trip. Meanwhile, Jinger and Jeremy tour a birth centre and find out the gender of their baby. Later, Lauren goes shopping for the perfect wedding gown.

programme.title: Counting On: Jinger's Double Surprise
programme.desc: Kendra's due date is approaching. She and Joe do some last minute prep, including a timed test run to the hospital. Meanwhile, Jinger and Jeremy throw a gender reveal party for the family and later, the family has a surprise of their own for Jinger.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: We're Having SIX-tuplets
programme.desc: The Waldrops are a family from Alabama with three lively boys. Parents Courtney and Eric get the shock of their lives when Courtney becomes pregnant with sextuplets. They face a high-risk delivery and the stress of becoming parents of nine kids overnight.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: What to Expect When You're Expecting Six Babies
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric struggle through a high-risk delivery. Six premature babies must survive the NICU and prepare to come home during a national flu crisis. One baby takes a turn for the worse, as the family faces nonstop feedings and mounting expenses.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby on a Boat
programme.desc: A woman has unexplained severe abdominal cramps while on a boat and in the middle of the open water.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby at the Mall
programme.desc: While working a retail job, Yanil suffers excruciating abdominal pain. She lies down in a stockroom to ride it out, and is shocked to find a baby crowning between her legs.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Baby and a Girdle
programme.desc: After a complicated pregnancy including a bout with Bell's Palsy, Victoria struggles to lose her baby weight. Never suspecting the real reason behind her extra pounds, she suddenly goes into labour at her mother-in-law's house.

programme.title: I Didn't Know I Was Pregnant: Crash and Born
programme.desc: When a student has a seizure behind the wheel, doctors discover that what's ailing her is much more serious than fatigue.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: A Hoarder
programme.desc: Raine struggles to clear her house of clutter before her baby is born, but it isn't easy. She suffers from hoarding, but knows that despite her compulsion, it is crucial for her baby's safety to clean up her act before the birth of her son.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Have OCD
programme.desc: Jenna's life is dominated by her OCD, with her second child on the way; she struggles with a condition that dictates her marriage and young son's life.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Have An Eating Disorder
programme.desc: A woman with an eating disorder turns to her husband and therapy during a pregnancy.

programme.title: I'm Pregnant And ...: Addicted
programme.desc: Now that Colette's pregnant, she believes that it's possibly riskier to go off the methadone during pregnancy, than to stay on it.

programme.title: Pregnant Behind Bars: Welcome to County
programme.desc: Inmate Jamie, a mother of four, struggles to gain visitation rights, and Tanya requests house arrest to prepare for the birth of her son.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Butch Cassidy's Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Christof uncovers new clues about the true fate of outlaws Butch Cassidy and the Sundance Kid. He travels to the highlands of Bolivia and the mountains of Utah to dig up evidence that may finally solve this 100-year-old mystery.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Axeman of New Orleans
programme.desc: A century ago, New Orleans was terrorized by an axe murderer. Now Christof discovers new leads that could point to some of the earliest mafia hits. This gruesome crime spree takes him from the Big Easy to Sicily and Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Black Dahlia Murder
programme.desc: Christof digs into the most infamous -- and gruesome -- unsolved murder case in Los Angeles history. He uncovers an investigation derailed by corruption and finds a confession pointing him to a new suspect in the Philippines.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Boston's Unsolved Art Heist
programme.desc: Christof investigates the robbery of the Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum, the largest art heist in history. In pursuit of the stolen masterpieces, he follows leads from dangerous members of organized crime that take him from Boston to Florida and France.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lost Treasure of Dutch Schultz
programme.desc: Christof joins the decades-long hunt for the buried millions of notorious gangster Dutch Schultz. Armed with rare documents and cutting-edge tech, Christof follows the fugitive mob boss's trail from Saratoga Springs, New York, to Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Escape From Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three prisoners escaped from Alcatraz in 1962. Officially, they died in the surrounding waters, but FBI files say otherwise. Christof Putzel braves those same waters to hunt down inside information before going on a manhunt to Brazil.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Lindbergh Kidnapping
programme.desc: Christof investigates the Lindbergh kidnapping, a story that made his grandfather's journalism career. Now, using his grandfather's notes and recently declassified FBI files, Christof tracks down surprising new leads to Germany and even the Nazi Party.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: The Hunt for D.B. Cooper
programme.desc: Christof jumps from a plane and digs up rare FBI files as he follows shocking new leads that take him from the Pacific Northwest to Las Vegas and Utah in his quest to find the real identity of hijacker D.B. Cooper.

programme.title: Mission Declassified: Decoding America's UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Christof heads to the woods of the UK and snowy fields of Canada to determine what the truth is behind UFO sightings. He soon uncovers a much bigger story behind what secrets the government is hiding.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: It's All Greek to Me
programme.desc: Join Chef Ben Robinson and eight new crew members as they prepare the luxury yacht, the Ionian Princess, for a new charter season around the glittering Greek Islands. Fresh faces present new challenges as the crew learns to work and live together.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Game Time
programme.desc: The crew's efforts to stream a football game in the middle of the Mediterranean don’t go as planned, but their efforts don't go unnoticed by charter guests. Ben redeems himself after the previous night's Moussaka mishaps.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Model Deckhands
programme.desc: After the crew's first night off, Hannah puts her foot down when Bobby and Danny bring girls back to the yacht. Bryan attempts to smooth things over with the captain, but the boys are given their first strike.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Lovesick Danny
programme.desc: Danny disobeys a direct order from Captain Mark when he decides to give a love poem to a charter guest. Julia calls her boyfriend in England, while Bobby's feelings for her grow stronger. Ben and Hannah's work relationship has reached smooth sailing.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: My Big Fat Greek Threesome
programme.desc: After Ben apologizes for shutting down Bryan and Tiffany’s fun, the crew prepares for their next charter hailing from Oklahoma. After hours, the charter guests seem to have a threesome in the jacuzzi and once again, Danny oversteps his boundaries.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Entrée-Vous
programme.desc: The crew must provide a romantic trip for new guests celebrating their seven-month dating anniversary. Bobby gets the green light to go after Julia, while Tiffany and Bryan get cozy in the hot tub. Meanwhile, Ben takes Hannah on a date.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's Got Game?
programme.desc: Hannah experiences the ultimate betrayal when Ben goes to the Captain about their galley miscommunication. After back-to-back charters, the Ionian Princess Crew finally enjoy a day off until Bryan decides to give Danny a lesson in dickie etiquette.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter King
programme.desc: Hannah’s migraine explodes when the bachelor charter guests bring back a large group of girls on board. Upon their exit, the bachelors anoint Danny as the charter MVP, much to the chagrin of Bobby and Bryan.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Fever Pitch
programme.desc: Hannah and Ben redefine their relationship while Bobby realizes he can't shut off his feelings for Julia after a flirty night with Hannah. After the crew pulls off a beach BBQ without a hitch, Ben is tasked with making American S'mores in Greece.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter From Heaven, Charter From Hell?
programme.desc: While Danny is away at the hospital, the crew revels in his absence. When Bryan confronts Jen on her ability to tie knots, she finally stands up to him. Meanwhile, Tiffany's feelings for Ben increase, while Bobby continues to be sidelined by Julia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: They Hate Us Cuz They Ain't Us
programme.desc: The demanding charter guests extend their stay, and Hannah puts on her best stew face to regain their trust. Julia and Ben have a class war after a miscommunication. Meanwhile, the Captain gives Danny his phone back, putting Bryan on high alert.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World

programme.title: NCIS: Death From Above

programme.title: NCIS: The Numerical Limit

programme.title: NCIS: Sight Unseen

programme.title: NCIS: One Step Forward

programme.title: NCIS: Two Steps Back
programme.desc: When evidence reveals an NCIS team member is a hitman’s latest target, the team must search through old case files to determine who is seeking vengeance.

programme.desc: The discovery of the bullet-riddled bodies of Skyla Whitaker and Taylor Placker in tiny Weleetka, Oklahoma sends the community into a state of panic. If two of Weleetka's most innocent can fall victim to the sadistic killer, no one in town is safe.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lurking in the Hollers
programme.desc: Family means everything to folks who live in the mountain hollers of Townsend, Tennessee. When one member of the large Griffin clan is found murdered and another goes missing, investigators begin to suspect that a family feud may have taken a deadly turn.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Words
programme.desc: Logan Schiendelman vanishes, and authorities find his car abandoned. Multiple tips claim seeing Logan, but searches turn up nothing. With no evidence of foul play, questions surface and police are forced to examine his family's controversial past.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Investigators find lies and false confessions across two states when a teenager is found dead in Kentucky.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Hitman 4 Hire
programme.desc: Leslie and Brian Long live in an affluent suburban of St. Clairsville, Ohio with their two beautiful kids. When Leslie goes online to make business contacts, the family is besieged with mysterious threats, and Bryan is almost killed by an unknown gunman.

programme.title: Diabolical: Murder Is No Accident
programme.desc: After Cynthia Roth drowns in the middle of a crowded lake, investigators will uncover a decades long trail of terror. To catch this killer before they can claim their next victim, detectives will have to take extraordinary measures.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Campaign Trail of Fears
programme.desc: A Texas politician and his wife are stalked by their private pilot, who will stop at nothing to destroy them.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Go to Daddy
programme.desc: The black sheep of the family has spent a lifetime in the shadow of her prodigal younger sister. As the relationship with her mother takes a turn for the worse, things build to a boil that will leave one family member dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A teenage mom and her circle of friends are carefree until they get caught up in a bizarre murder case.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Route 29
programme.desc: In August 2013, a 17-year-old rising social media star and high school athlete disappeared along the infamous Route 29. A massive search by local and federal authorities yielded zero results until a security video revealed a chilling clue.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it's up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice. Then Police break up a domestic dispute and find a body in the bedroom.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Primal Instincts
programme.desc: It's Mother's Day and first-time mom Tennyson Jacobson is looking forward to celebrating with her family. But when she spends her daughter's naptime fighting off a violent intruder, Tennyson can't shake the feeling he'll soon be back to strike again.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Kind Sister
programme.desc: Elizabeth Baune was a pillar of her community until she was stabbed to death in her own home. The rural town of Payette, Idaho is horrified by the tragic death of a teacher, especially since Elizabeth's own good nature may have been behind her death.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Hitler's mastery of propaganda, and instinct for effective design, used to create everything from the swastika flag to the striking uniforms of the storm troopers, help win huge support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Hitler promises to make Germany great again by creating 14,000 miles of freeway and building one and half million 'People's Cars' every year. Instead, the Nazi war economy relies on millions of forced labourers and prisoners.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: American Titans: Vanderbilt vs. Drew
programme.desc: Railroad kingpin Cornelius Vanderbilt takes on his old friend Daniel Drew in a Wall Street war for the Erie Railroad. Vanderbilt has millions, but sly Drew and his protégés, Jay Gould and Jim Fisk, are set to break the bank of America's biggest tycoon.

programme.title: American Titans: Edison vs. Tesla
programme.desc: In the late 1800's a new life-changing electrical industry emerges with the two greatest minds of the day, Thomas Edison and Nikola Tesla, backing opposing positions on how the multi-million dollar industry will transmit power for the next century.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Ma Deuce
programme.desc: Nicknamed the 'Ma Deuce', this fifty caliber American machine gun has been rocking the battlefield for over eighty years. Host Wil Willis puts this legendary weapon to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Planet X
programme.desc: A look at the giant hidden planet with a gravitational pull so strong that it would literally cause the earth to turn upside down.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Nuclear Apocalypse
programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Screaming Eagles in Afghanistan
programme.desc: In 2010, the 'Screaming Eagles' of the 101st Airborne Division face off against the Taliban during Operation Dragon Strike. The American soldiers of the 101st head up Afghanistan's 'Highway to Hell' to take back the countryside from a deadly enemy.

programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.
