programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Kitchen Resurrection
programme.desc: Trent begins work on an abandoned 1895 home in Charleston, South Carolina.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Making a Grand Entrance
programme.desc: Trent tackles the front entrance and common room in a home that hasn't been lived in for over 50 years. Trent wrestles with the front door's historic hardware and attempts to expose a 100-year-old fireplace.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Sweet Master Suite
programme.desc: Trent begins renovating an old bedroom into a full master suite. He adds a beautiful, functional bathroom and a massive walk-in closet. Trent must also determine what to do with a historic fireplace that's in ruins.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Bedrooms, Bats, and Beadboard
programme.desc: An unwanted visitor appears while Trent is gathering precious beadboard from the ceiling of the abandoned home. He must also figure out how to turn an old dining room into a new mudroom, laundry room, and bathroom.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Appleby of My Eye
programme.desc: While restoring the home's exterior and working on the porch, Trent and his crew experience an unexpected setback.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Low Country Cottage Unease
programme.desc: Trent restores the first floor of a cottage by rebuilding the stairs, kitchen, living room, and dining room.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Raising the Roof for Room
programme.desc: Trent opens up the roof of the cottage in order to add more square footage for a master bathroom. In the master bathroom, he adds signature touches including an antique vanity and a unique accent to the floor.

programme.title: Restoring Charleston: Charleston Cottage Curb Appeal
programme.desc: For a cottage that has no curb appeal, Trent rolls up his sleeves and attacks the exterior of the small historic home. He replaces the siding with one that matches exactly to the time period and restores an old shed.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ship-shape Shack
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full transforming a family's treasured 1950s lobster shack into a cabin that will create a lifetime of memories for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp
programme.desc: After buying her parents' old summer camp in Bridgton, a mother calls on the crew to help her completely renovate the home for her parents to retire in full-time. With a $40,000 budget and an open time line, the crew transform it into a retirement space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Ho-Ho-Home!
programme.desc: Doug, aka Santa, and his wife Lois inherited a 1,250-square-foot cabin that's been in her family since 1958. With no major renovations since the 1970s, Chase and the team are excited to perform a Christmas miracle and transform this cabin.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hoboken, New Jersey
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing adventures take him to Hoboken, New Jersey, New York's neighbor to the west and the home of the great Frank Sinatra. He munches on homemade mozzarella and takes a bite out of a bagel behemoth.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Tacos Del Carnival
programme.desc: Tacos are more than a staple of Mexican cuisine, they're a carnival favorite. Join Noah as he eats seven of the nation's most creative tacos. From a fresh succulent Soft Shell Crab Taco to authentic Tacos Al Pastor.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Carnival Italiano
programme.desc: Noah tries a clever calzone-Lasagna hybrid and a special pizza and pasta combo.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob
programme.desc: From enchilada funnel cake to bacon bbq, Noah Cappe samples the menu at the Three Rivers Festival in Fort Wayne.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Point Break-Fast
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts the day right at the Shasta District Fair in Anderson, California.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Mad Snacks: Berry Road
programme.desc: Noah Cappe travels back in time at the Texas Renaissance Festival, where the medieval-inspired meals range from the Sir Francis fry dog to the crown jewel. Then it's over to Plant City, Fla., where Noah chows down on some berry delicious carnival treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Requiem for an Ice Cream
programme.desc: Noah Cappe rolls into Alabama for some country carnival cookin' at the Greater Gulf State Fair in Mobile. He digs into the dirty bird turkey leg and takes a ride on a crazy midway mashup.

programme.desc: The Pugs head to the end of a rainbow to find a pot big enough for Bob's St. Patrick's Day stew! Bob and the pups plan on joining the Playcare's yoga class!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bye Bye, Butterfly/ A Seat at the Theatre
programme.desc: Two puppies who love to have fun take on adventures around their neighbourhood.

programme.title: Bluey: Army / Fancy Restaurant / Stumpfest
programme.desc: Jack and Rusty play Army at school. The girls set up a fancy restaurant for Mum and Dad! Bluey, Bingo and Muffin strike a deal with the dads.

programme.title: Danger Force: Miles Has Visions
programme.desc: When AWOL starts seeing visions of the future right before they happen, Captain Man believes it must be the work of Swellview’s leading time-crime villain, The Time Jerker.

programme.title: Danger Force: Cat
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: The Loud House: For Bros About to Rock/ It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever.

programme.title: The Loud House: House Music/ A Novel Idea
programme.desc: Lincoln signs his family up for a talent show and they form a band. It's Dad's annual Take Your Daughter to Work Day so Mom offers to take Lincoln to her work: a dental office.

programme.title: The Loud House: Roughin' It/ The Waiting Game
programme.desc: Lincoln is worried that he's lost his manliness from growing up with all sisters, so he and Clyde go camping. Lincoln gets Lori a job at a pizza arcade, but when he starts to ask favors of her, Lori gets in hot water.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Away Game/ Monster Cash
programme.desc: Abuela worries that Ronnie Anne and Bobby will want to live at their dad's new apartment permanently. Carl hosts a haunted tour based on Abuela's tale of 'El Cucuy' and learns that this story may not be fiction.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Bo Bo Business/ Blunder Party
programme.desc: After a disagreement with Abuelo, Bobby goes to work for Mr. Hong to try out his new business ideas.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: The Kid Plays in the Picture/ Achy Breaky Art
programme.desc: Carl’s love for toys gets him caught up in a whirlwind toy review career./ Frida’s art gets a bad review, the kids try to stage a new auction to lift her spirits.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Club SpongeBob/ My Pretty Seahorse
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick build a small clubhouse and tell Squid he can't join. Spongebob finds a stray sea horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nasty Patty/ Idiot Box
programme.desc: When the health inspector comes, Krabs tries to get the joint up to code.

programme.title: Are You Afraid of the Dark?: The Tale of the Midnight Magic
programme.desc: The Midnight Society gathers around the campfire to tell each other spooky tales.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Wet Painters/ Krusty Krab Training Video
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs has SpongeBob and Patrick paint the inside of his house; training for employees.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born Again Krabs/ Safety Freak SpongeBob
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs refuses to let SpongeBob throw away a mouldy Krabby Patty under the grill.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Missing Identity/ Plankton's Army
programme.desc: SpongeBob loses his nametag; Plankton is after the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob Meets the Strangler/ Pranks a Lot
programme.desc: SpongeBob turns in the littering Tattletale Strangler; SpongeBob and Patrick invest in a local prank shop's magic 'invisible spray'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Mattress/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Bob buys Mr. Krabs a new mattress; Plankton sues Mr. Krabs for failing to post a warning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Dunces and Dragons/ Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy VI: The Motion Picture
programme.desc: A freak jousting accident lands Bob and Pat in a medieval Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever
programme.desc: Spongebob decides he is going to have the best day ever.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick Smartpants/ SquidBob Tentaclepants
programme.desc: A knock on the head gives Patrick superior intellect, and Spongebob and Squidward accidentally get melded into one body when Sandy's teleportation machine malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chimps Ahoy/ Ghost House
programme.desc: The Chimpanzee beneficiaries of Sandy's undersea tree dome are paying a visit to see what progress she has made with her inventions. The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born to Be Wild/ Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Spongebob must protect the town from a biker gang; new smoothies are the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Loud House: Cover Girls/ Save the Date
programme.desc: All 10 of Lincoln's sisters ask him to cover for them on the same day. Bobby and Lori go on a double date with Lincoln and Ronnie Anne.

programme.title: The Loud House: April Fools Rules/ Cereal Offender
programme.desc: Every April Fool’s Day, Luan pranks the entire household, but this year, Lincoln has a plan to not get pranked. The Loud kids make a trip to the supermarket to do the grocery shopping for Mom, but Lincoln has other plans.

programme.title: The Loud House: Dance Dance Resolution/ A Fair to Remember
programme.desc: Lincoln's sisters accidentally land him four dates for the Sadie Hawkins dance at school. When Lincoln and Bobby become friends, Lori sets out to make Bobby jealous by hanging out with Clyde.

programme.title: The Loud House: Attention Deficit/ Out on a Limo
programme.desc: Clyde's dads give Lincoln more attention than he gets at home. Lincoln wins a ride in a limo and starts to change after soaking up the good life.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: The Loud House: Funny Business/ Snow Bored
programme.desc: Lincoln becomes Luan's clown assistant, but starts hogging the spotlight. The Loud kids set out to show Lisa what is 'fun' about a snow day.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Space Ducks/ Kettastrophe
programme.desc: Sway Sway and Buhdeuce are delivering bread in space.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: When SwaySway and Buhdeuce are trapped in a cave of stale bread by a ferocious Tunnel Eater, the guys pass the time by reminiscing about how they first met and became best baps for life.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Lil Loafie/ Oonski the Grateful
programme.desc: When T-Midi rejects a loaf of defective bread, SwaySway and Buhdeuce take the loaf under their wing and it becomes super famous. When the ducks accidentally save Oonski from a monster, he owes them a debt of gratitude.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Pizzawinnders/ Yeasterday
programme.desc: Buhdeuce eats Yeasterday Bready to fix his bad day but it causes problems for SwaySway. SwaySway and Buhdeuce get some competition from two cranes that start delivering pizza.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Night of the Living Bread
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce invent a loaf of bread that is so irresistible it turns their customers into bread craving zombies.

programme.title: Breadwinners: Pondgea's Got Talent/ Raging Mole
programme.desc: When Pumpers holds a talent show, SwaySway must overcome his stage fright to perform a love song for Jenny Quackles. SwaySway and Buhdeuce convince the Bread Maker to lose a wrestling match to Lava Mole.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Fart Baby/ Kung-Fu Catapault
programme.desc: Sanjay and Craig are the proud parents of a baby fart. Sanjay and Craig agree to rid Tufflips' trailer of ghosts in return for a catapult.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Trouble Dare/ Road Pizza
programme.desc: The dudes play the Dicksons in an epic game of Family Double Dare. Then, Craig gets possessed by an evil pizza demon that wants to destroy the Frycade.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Cup O' Universe/ You're in Trouble
programme.desc: A universe is discovered in a milkshake cup; the duo tries not to wet the bed while at overnight camp.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Dino Fury: Destination Dinohenge
programme.desc: Go-getting reporter Amelia accompanies Ollie and his mom, Dr. Akana, to investigate the mysterious Dinohenge statues. They run into an evil warrior named Void Knight and a threat that puts the entire world in danger.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Booger Johnson/ Dream Rangers
programme.desc: Craig can't stop eating Megan's pet gerbil. Also, Sanjay and Craig must re-enter their dream to rescue Belle.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig: Day of the Snake/ Prickerbeast Punk
programme.desc: Sanjay discovers all the awesome things Craig does when Sanjay's at school. Then, the kids discover a local legend is a lie and get revenge on their parents.

programme.title: The Loud House: Intern for the Worse/ The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: The Loud House: House of Lies/ Game Boys
programme.desc: After witnessing an excess of lying in the family, Lisa invents lie-detecting glasses to try and curb the fibs. Lincoln asks to borrow Clyde's new gaming system, but Clyde struggles to trust that it's safe with him.

programme.title: The Nickelodeon Kids' Choice Awards
programme.desc: An annual award show celebrating everything kids love.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!
programme.desc: Donald and Penumbra must break out of a Moon Prison and send a warning to Earth about a looming invasion. Meanwhile, Dewey and Webby uncover a sinister conspiracy targeting their family.

programme.title: DuckTales: A Nightmare on Killmotor Hill!
programme.desc: The kids are pulled into a world made of their wildest dreams. Unfortunately, Lena's worst nightmare comes true: Magica De Spell is back and coming to reclaim what's hers.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Golden Armory of Cornelius Coot
programme.desc: Webby leads the kids in a race against the Beagles to find a secret treasure while hiding a secret of her own. Della is forced to teach Launchpad how to actually fly a plane.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Richest Duck in the World!
programme.desc: Louie, Scrooge, and Owlson must escape from an unstoppable monster cursed to hunt down and destroy the richest duck in the world.

programme.title: DuckTales: How Santa Stole Christmas!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: Escape from the ImpossiBin!
programme.desc: With F.O.W.L. at their heels, Scrooge tests out the Money Bin’s deadly new security system on Louie and Della, while Beakley and Webby train the others for an enemy attack.

programme.title: DuckTales: The First Adventure!
programme.desc: Scrooge is forced to babysit young Donald and Della as they go on their first adventure to find a powerful artifact, unaware that Bradford is taking on this mission personally.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Fight for Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: A bitter feud between Scrooge and his sister spreads to the rest of the family as Phantom Blot attempts to steal a priceless artifact and destroy Castle McDuck once and for all.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beaks in the Shell!
programme.desc: Huey struggles to keep Fenton and Gandra’s top secret experiment (and their relationship) hidden from the world. Mark Beaks is desperate for one last gizmo to steal.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Cargo of Kit Cloudkicker!
programme.desc: Della, Dewey, and Huey recruit a showboating pilot to take them to an island full of monsters in search of a Missing Mystery, unaware that Don Karange is hot on their tails.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Phantom and the Sorceress!
programme.desc: When a mysterious magic thief arrives in Duckburg, Lena must confront her past and team with her treacherous aunt, Magica.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Day of the Only Child!
programme.desc: Dewey creates a holiday so that triplets can be only children for just one day. Quickly, the brothers learn that they need each other more than they realized.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Split Sword of Swanstantine!
programme.desc: The kids pair off to find the missing pieces of a mystical sword hidden throughout an Istanboar marketplace, unless F.O.W.L. gets to them first.

programme.desc: Huey struggles to keep Fenton and Gandra’s top secret experiment (and their relationship) hidden from the world. Mark Beaks is desperate for one last gizmo to steal.

programme.title: DuckTales: Moonvasion!
programme.desc: The family rallies an army to defend against an invasion. As Della and the kids search the globe for reinforcements, Scrooge leads his ragtag troops against Lunaris’ forces.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Trickening!
programme.desc: The kids forego their usual trick-or-treat path and instead take on the most haunted house in Duckburg.

programme.title: DuckTales: How Santa Stole Christmas!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.desc: A spy video game turns dangerously real as Launchpad and Dewey must stop F.O.W.L. agent Steelbeak’s plan to destroy Duckburg.

programme.title: Futurama: The Birdbot of Ice-Catraz

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Brown Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Cleveland celebrates his first Thanksgiving with his new family, including his own parents Cookie and Freight Train as well as Donna's Auntie Momma, who all make a surprise visit to shake things up.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: From Bed to Worse
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna are excited to have the house to themselves when Cleveland Jr. and Roberta go on a school trip to Washington, D.C., but a disgruntled Rallo will do whatever it takes to keep Cleveland and Donna apart.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: A Cleveland Brown Christmas
programme.desc: When Cleveland fills in as Santa Claus at his office holiday party, he has one too many eggnogs and lets the truth slip about Rallo's father. With Rallo's admiration for his dad destroyed, Cleveland tries to reconnect father and son.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Field of Streams
programme.desc: After a nostalgic flashback to the glory days as his high school's baseball all-star, Cleveland visits his alma mater to find out there's no longer a team. Principal Wally gives Cleveland one week to raise money to rebuild the stadium.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Love Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Roberta's new teacher, Ms. Eck, encourages Roberta to alter her appearance to teach her an important lesson. Cleveland Jr. befriends the disguised Roberta, only to fall in love with her.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Our Gang
programme.desc: Coach Cleveland comes to the rescue of frustrated parents by taking a group of delinquent teens under his wing. With the help of Cleveland Jr., he creates a new club dubbed The Crazy Eights, and hopes that it will keep the kids on the right track.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Buried Pleasure
programme.desc: Holt admits to Cleveland that he wishes he had a special someone in his life. Determined to help his lonely friend, Cleveland introduces Holt to the cat-loving redhead Jill. Meanwhile, Cleveland Jr. and Rallo anticipate the 'birth' of Rallo's pet fish.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: The Curious Case of Jr. Working at The Stool
programme.desc: A feud erupts between father and son when Cleveland Jr. gets a job at Cleveland's preferred bar and begins judging his father's drinking habits. Meanwhile, Roberta competes with the rich girl in school.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Once Upon a Tyne in New York
programme.desc: Cleveland and Donna take a road trip to the Big Apple for an overdue honeymoon, and to Donna's dismay, Cleveland allows the Stoolbend gang to tag along to help Coach McFall rekindle a long lost romance.

programme.title: The Office: Share Holders Meeting
programme.desc: When Michael learns he is going to be honoured at the Dunder Mifflin shareholder meeting in New York City, he brings Andy, Dwight and Oscar with him. Jim is left in charge of the office, and has a hard time getting Ryan to do any work.

programme.title: The Office: Scott's Tots
programme.desc: Michael has to face the music when he realizes he cannot keep a promise he made to a group of kids 10 years earlier.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Money Maker

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Crazy for You
programme.desc: The detectives must piece together partial clues to lead them to the murderer of a husband-and-wife team of psychiatrists. Jane finds herself closer to the investigation than she realizes.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cuts Like a Knife
programme.desc: A bride is killed right before she walks down the aisle, and Jane and Maura must figure out if the groom's ex-girlfriend is a suspect or if there is a deeper connection to the bride's European roots.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Home Town Glory
programme.desc: A boy band star returns to his roots for a show and winds up murdered. Meanwhile, Jane and Maura must decide if it's time to tell Angela the truth about Lydia's pregnancy.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Melt My Heart to Stone
programme.desc: When a statue breaks open to reveal a dead woman inside, Jane and Maura must find the killer quickly as the body count begins to rise. Back at headquarters, a new homicide detective is named to the squad.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Class Action Satisfaction

programme.desc: As Meredith, Derek and all of their friends prepare for the big wedding, a group of college students are admitted after being injured in a car crash on their way to their graduation ceremony. Meanwhile, Izzie fears the worst.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Here's to Future Days/ Now or Never

programme.title: The Closer: The Last Word
programme.desc: A young street hustler sees what appears to be a man burying a woman in Griffith Park prompting an investigation Brenda is convinced will lead to Philip Stroh.

programme.title: The Closer: Pilot
programme.desc: The new head of the Priority Murder Squad investigates the murder of an unknown woman.

programme.title: The Closer: About Face

programme.title: Major Crimes: Targets of Opportunity
programme.desc: After an officer-involved shooting leaves two L.A. policemen dead, the Major Crimes unit must work with the Deputy Chief of the LAPD Special Operations Bureau, Fritz Howard, to piece together this high stakes case of disguise.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Hostage of Fortune
programme.desc: New information prompts the re-opening of an old kidnapping investigation, forcing Captain Raydor into partnership with a potentially corrupt FBI agent. Meanwhile, Rusty works with the team on the case to secretly gather information.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Wish You Were Here
programme.desc: When a YouTube video of a bloodied, half-naked man walking down the middle of a street with a gun goes viral, Major Crimes must decide whether the victim was targeted or a potential suicide.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Over/ Under
programme.desc: A former college football player is stabbed inside a carwash during a fundraiser for his alma mater. Meanwhile, Frost's mother visits Boston with news.

programme.desc: Investigators believe Wayne Williams, a 23-year-old black man, murdered more than two dozen black children and young men in Atlanta. The 40 year-old evidence is re-examined using modern forensics in search of more answers.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Mystery of Heaven's Gate
programme.desc: Hundreds of people vanished without a trace in the mid 1970s, leaving their families was distraught and wondering about them for decades. In March 1997, shocking news of a mysterious religious group made world headlines.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: The Secret They Couldn’t Talk About Part 1
programme.desc: Susan Powell, a 28-year-old mother of two, goes missing in December of 2009. The mystery deepens as more details about her marriage to husband Josh and their life behind closed doors emerge.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Finding Susan Powell: What the Children Saw Part 2
programme.desc: Authorities search for missing mother of two, Susan Powell, in every nook and cranny of the desert in Western Utah while her friends and family wait for a break in the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Horse Play
programme.desc: A young, happily married woman died tragically in a horseback riding accident. Her husband seemed far from grief-stricken and, when they investigated his background, police discovered a web of lies and a proficiency with pharmaceuticals.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: To Be Announced

programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.desc: Rebecca Zahau seemed to have it all, until she’s found dead in a multi-million dollar mansion, hanging from a balcony under bizarre circumstances. Police ruled her death a suicide, but some aren’t buying it.

programme.desc: College student Elisa Lam checks into a Los Angeles hotel, but never checks out. The last known images of the tourist are from the hotel’s elevator security camera. Nearly 2 weeks later, her naked body is found floating in the hotel's rooftop water tank.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Vanished From the Crib
programme.desc: Baby Lisa Irwin goes missing from her crib in the middle of the night. Stolen cell phones and a disturbing debit card charge on the parent’s account only adds to the mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Dozer Dave Returns
programme.desc: Dave Turin, a former 'Gold Rush' miner, sets out on his own prospecting for an abandoned gold mine to reopen. When an investor backs out, Dave has to decide if he's willing to risk his family's life savings on his ability to bring home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery
programme.desc: Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why. With his season hanging in the balance, the pressure mounts for Dave to get them back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Cowboys and Pirates
programme.desc: On Hawaii's Big Island, Josh enlists the help of Johnathan Hillstrand to help him dive deeper into the mystery of Phil's charts and gain insight into the time Phil spent in Kona Town.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Legacy Continues
programme.desc: With only two days left before they must head back to Dutch Harbor for King Crab season, Josh and Casey have one last goal to achieve in Hawaii: land a big marlin, the one fish that eluded Phil Harris decades ago.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Pot-Still Vodka
programme.desc: Outlaw and legal distillers compete to make vodka, once the secret to surviving a Russian winter, and now America's most-consumed spirit. Mark, Digger and Tim judge as distillers design their own stills and mash in their own raw ingredients.

programme.desc: Three distillers compete to make a recipe created by George Washington himself. Judged by legends Mark, Digger and Tim, only one competitor can earn the prestigious title of Master Distiller for producing the first president's own signature liquor.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Spirit of the South
programme.desc: Distillers compete to make peach brandy, a spirit so prized in the Old South it was once more popular than whiskey. Judged by moonshiners Mark, Digger and Tim, only one outlaw or legal distiller will prevail to earn the title of Master Distiller.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Master Distiller: Battle of the Judges
programme.desc: Tim Smith challenges Mark and Digger to a moonshine-making rematch. Hot stills and hotter heads clash as all three legends face off to see who can bring the best jar of moonshine to the table and win the ultimate bragging rights.

programme.desc: At the hospital, Myrka's contractions get worse. Jenna's mom causes a scene at her baby shower. Kim discourages Lilly from making the same mistake twice.

programme.title: Unpolished: Where's the Money?
programme.desc: Big Mike's passing and the pandemic have left Jen in a financial mess, putting Bria's fairytale wedding in jeopardy. Bria and Lexi collaborate on a client's unique request for her daughter's birthday. The Martone ladies go to extreme lengths for help.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Mother's Day Surprise
programme.desc: Courtney struggles to split her time between the babies and the older boys. Eric takes on more work to keep up with new expenses. The family attempts their first public outing with the sextuplets on Mother's Day and soon face one of their biggest fears.

programme.title: Sweet Home Sextuplets: A Whole New Ballgame
programme.desc: Courtney and Eric bring the sextuplets to the twins' baseball game, but the babies quickly become a big distraction. Eric faces a major financial decision about selling the sheep.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Katherine and Joel
programme.desc: Katherine will go on a major haul before taking a six-month break from couponing. Joel is a 16-year-old who is obsessed with couponing.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Heather and Bree
programme.desc: Heather shops for groceries and baby clothes at Kmart. Bree makes her own laundry detergent and tries to beat her budget of $140 a month for groceries.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Joyce and Aprille
programme.desc: Aprille works at an auto dealership and bribes her co-workers with snacks from her stockpile.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Lisa and April
programme.desc: Lisa hopes to spend $15 for a month's worth of groceries to feed her family of six.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Erin and Dominique
programme.desc: Erin tries to get a haul worth over $2,000 for free, but her unorganized method may be her downfall.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Jeff and Kelly
programme.desc: Jeff is passing the couponing torch to his son. Kelly is couponing for her basketball team's post game party.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Black Market Baby Dealer
programme.desc: In the 1950s and 1960s, a doctor named Thomas Hicks illegally sold over 200 babies on the black market. Now, lead investigator, Jane Blasio, is working to reunite stolen babies with biological families while trying to unearth secrets about Hicks himself.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Forced Delivery
programme.desc: Jane discovers a suspicious pattern of babies with extremely low birth weights coming out of the clinic. Chris makes a discovery of his own, Dr. Hicks may have hidden birth records in his mausoleum. Diane hopes to meet her biological father.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Mausoleum Break-in
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa meet the first Hicks baby, Stephen Dilbeck. They work to find his family and solve the mystery of why Hicks sold that first baby. Chris and Dr. Hicks' granddaughter Sallie bust open the mausoleum in search of birth records.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Unexpected Revelations
programme.desc: After 70 years of searching, Stephen Dilbeck gets some shocking information about his birth family from Jane and Lisa. Meanwhile, Chris and Sallie work on getting approval of an exhumation that will answer questions for hundreds of Hicks babies.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Buried Truth
programme.desc: Jane and Lisa share the news about the exhumation with a group of Hicks Babies that have questioned whether Dr. Hicks was in fact their biological father. Sallie faces the reality of exhuming her father. The exhumation begins.

programme.title: Taken at Birth: Secrets from the Grave
programme.desc: Wendy and her team encounter unexpected challenges with the exhumation. Sallie struggles emotionally with her decision to exhume. After the exhumation, Sallie and the Hicks babies learn the DNA results. Hicks babies are connected with their family.

programme.desc: Calvin bites the other buyers, slithering to a profit. Darrell Sheets takes charge and wins a vault that furnishes his bank roll. Jarrod and Brandi grab the auction by the horns, making them the true winners of the auction.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The PA Stays in the Picture
programme.desc: The buyers venture out to Rancho Cucamonga, Calif., where Jarrod and Brandi go bonkers over a small set of tools. Barry gets to the auction late and partners up with a pinch bidder.

programme.title: Storage Wars: All's Well That Urns Well
programme.desc: The buyers take a bite out of Orange, Calif., where Barry drops a locker on himself. Ivy Calvin digs through the garbage and finds some collectibles.

programme.title: Storage Wars: A Time to Kiln
programme.desc: The buyers head out to rainy San Jacinto, California, where Darrell discovers something that is music to his ears. Brandi and Jarrod find they need to team up with Barry if they want to make any money. Nabila tries to expand her territory.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Oysters on the Half Plate
programme.desc: The buyers dock in Long Beach, California, where Barry shells out for a unit that leads him to the high seas and Darrell and Brandon find an interesting kit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Old Tricks, New Treats
programme.desc: Herb and Mike find something that is music to their ears. Jarrod and Brandi use old tricks on the new buyers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Orange You Glad Dan Sold it Again?
programme.desc: A new buyer challenges both Barry and Jarrod, and makes off with a packed locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Monster Hash
programme.desc: The buyers encounter new auctioneers in Costa Mesa, Calif. Darrell defends his turf, and things get a little monstrous. Ivy Calvin finds a tool he's never seen before.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The French Job
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find some toys, and Jarrod tries to battle a world champion.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Flight of the Gambler
programme.desc: Brandi learns that Jarrod is facing a problem that affects more than just their business.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Shrining
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find their sense of charity. Barry unearths a bag that has him hitting the slopes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys use a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: The guys run a surprise challenge, and a stint at The Cake Boss's counter is anything but sweet. Then, advice for kida turns awkward when heard by strangers, and tonight's loser looks for a new 'do.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal have customers seeing red while working at an optician's office, then get too close for comfort eavesdropping on strangers' conversations. Plus, the big loser gives the business at a networking event.

programme.title: Movie: Just Friends
programme.desc: A formerly overweight record producer returns to his hometown for the holidays after a 10-year absence only to compete against a former classmate for the affections of the girl he loved in high school.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Q, Murr, Joe and Sal offer up peculiar specials at a steakhouse and get creepy while helping to clean a prop house. Plus, tonight's big loser realizes he may need his own lifeguard after making waves at the pool.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: The Food Flattener
programme.desc: At a cooking class, Michael gets crabby when chopping salad and brings the heat to instantly cook a meatball with his breath. Later, Michael chills his assistant to her bones when a cryotherapy experiment freezes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dr. Bones
programme.desc: Michael explores the true depth of a deep-dish pizza, and later, he plays doctor to a patient questioning his own vision and sanity. Plus, as a locksmith, Michael stuns his assistant with a surprise on the other side of the door.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Great Escape

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Field of Screams
programme.desc: The guys must identify the joker behind the humiliating commands in a voice-disguising challenge. Then, they call it quits with a cringe-worthy public announcement, and act as dinosaur experts with preposterous prehistoric lessons.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Skull With a Flower Hat
programme.desc: The trick that nearly burned Michaels face, who he gets in prank wars with on-set, and which trick did he created a prop for.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: A Positive Presence
programme.desc: Learn which trick Michael has been performing since he was a child, who embarked on a 21-day juice diet cleanse and what moment had everyone on set erupting with laughter.

programme.desc: Find out which trick went viral on a hip-hop blog, what word is hard for Michael to pronounce and what degree Michael earned in college.

programme.title: Modern Family: Do It Yourself
programme.desc: Feeling empowered after his successful do-it-yourself project, Phil convinces Jay to co-invest in a property he has always wanted to develop.

programme.title: Modern Family: Heavy Is the Head
programme.desc: Despite their hopes, Phil and Jay's property investment might turn out to be a bust, forcing Phil to rethink his original dream. Meanwhile, Cam lands in the hospital due to a head injury and refuses to have an MRI thanks to a traumatic childhood incident.

programme.title: Modern Family: Finding Fizbo
programme.desc: Cam is enraged when he receives an online video showing someone has been desecrating his beloved Fizbo costume, which sets him on a quest to restore Fizbo's good name.

programme.title: Modern Family: Basketball
programme.desc: After choking at last year's charity basketball game, Phil has been training all year to redeem himself. However, when NBA stars Charles Barkley and DeAndre Jordan attend the game and start making bets, Phil tries to not buckle under the pressure.

programme.title: Modern Family: Pig Moon Rising
programme.desc: During a quick workout session in the garage, Mitchell accidentally knocks over an urn filled with the ashes of Cam's beloved pet pig Lilly. He quickly attempts to cover up his blunder and devises an appropriate cover-up.

programme.title: Modern Family: Five Minutes
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam have five minutes to catch a new flight while fighting the effects of sleeping pills they took prematurely. Then, at Rainer's birthday dinner, Haley and Rainer are forced to re-evaluate their entire relationship in the five minutes.

programme.title: Modern Family: Frank's Wedding
programme.desc: Frank's Roaring 20s-themed wedding day is finally here, and to get into the spirit, Phil gets the Dunphy clan to show up in costume. Once Claire and the kids realize they are the only ones dressed-up, they feel it's time for an intervention with Phil.

programme.title: Modern Family: All Things Being Equal
programme.desc: Gloria, Claire, Haley, Alex, Lily, Luke and Manny are equally committed to showing their support for gender equality and the women's movement in very different ways.

programme.title: Modern Family: Alone Time
programme.desc: Everyone deserves a little alone time now and then, so when Mitch and Jay separately seek out a much-needed retreat from the family and end up at the same resort, it becomes clear just how related they really are.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Graduates
programme.desc: In the season finale, Manny's father, Javier, shows up for his graduation and takes him out on a wild night of celebration, and then Jay steps in to pick up the pieces.

programme.title: E! True Hollywood Story: Cardi B
programme.desc: Cardi B defines the current moment in pop. But before she ruled rap, she had to overcome poverty and health issues. In-depth interviews reveal how this legend built herself from the ground up while staying unapologetically herself, no matter what.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kris Jenner's Legacy
programme.desc: When Scott realizes that the girls know very little about Kris's history, he sets out to make her a commemorative legacy video. Meanwhile Kendall's anxiety strikes again right before Milan Fashion week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trimester Trouble
programme.desc: Khloé attempts to keep her pregnancy a secret while dealing with some complications, Kourtney questions whether she's done having kids, and Kris debuts a loud new hairdo.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Gender Reveal
programme.desc: The girls take one last sister getaway to San Francisco before their babies arrive, but they quickly get fed up with Kourtney's bad attitude. Kim wants to include her family is the surrogacy process, and Khloe anxiously awaits to hear her baby's gender.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Photo Shoot Dispute
programme.desc: A fight over the family Christmas card escalates into a major feud between Kourtney, Kim, and Khloé. Meanwhile, Scott feels guilty for moving on to a new relationship.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Art of the Prank
programme.desc: Kim and Khloé try to get to the root of Kourtney's bad attitude, which ignites another huge fight between the girls.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Drop Dead Gorgeous
programme.desc: Kris worries that pregnant Khloé is taking her healthy lifestyle too far and putting her baby at risk. Meanwhile Scott's business trip to Miami takes a wild turn, jeopardizing an exciting new business venture.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Nightmare Before Christmas
programme.desc: Kourtney ponders taking a holiday during the holidays to get away from non-stop fighting with her sisters. Khloé tries to avoid the public eye until it's time for her pregnancy announcement. Kris is worried that she's being poisoned.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family Feud
programme.desc: Kourtney is devastated when Scott introduces the kids to his girlfriend without her permission. Meanwhile the family is determined to redeem themselves on Celebrity Family Feud at all costs, and Kim encounters an issue with her selfie taking.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: We Love Chicago
programme.desc: Kim prepares for the birth of her third child, Khloé struggles to choose a godparent for her baby, and Kourtney makes her dancing debut in a flash mob.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Perfect Stormi
programme.desc: Kourtney lashes out at her mom over issues from the past, Khloé is devastated by an unexpected loss, and Kylie welcomes her first baby.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: An American Model in Paris
programme.desc: Kourtney is furious when Kim leaks some personal information about her to the family. Meanwhile Kim struggles to make Kanye a priority, and Kendall lets loose on a whirlwind trip to Paris.

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Your go-to for behind-the-scenes scoop, celebrity guests and entertainment conversation.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashians Take Japan
programme.desc: Kim scrambles to shoot an entire Yeezy season seven campaign while in Japan, but worries that her sisters' questionable fashion sense might jeopardize the debut of the line.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Let's Play Ball!
programme.desc: The Kardashians take on the Jacksons in a charity softball game. Meanwhile, Kris pools her resources to renovate the Watts Empowerment Center, and Khloé and Scott devise a clever plan to reveal Art Vandelay's true identity.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Lord and His Lady
programme.desc: Inspired by the March for Our Lives demonstration, Kim meets with the survivors of the Parkland shooting to learn about their movement. Meanwhile, Scott revives his podcast with Khloé in Cleveland, and Kylie feels insecure about her post-baby body.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story
programme.desc: The family rushes to Cleveland to be by Khloé's side while she gives birth and comes face to face with Tristan for the first time since news of his infidelity broke. Kim reconnects with old friends at her 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Diners, Drive-Ins And Dives Tournament 2: Part 2
programme.desc: The tournament continues as four more DDD chefs try to win a Flavortown shopping spree and a spot in the finale. Making a hot sandwich sounds easy until the chefs find out that one of the key ingredients is out of stock!

programme.desc: As moose season opens, the hunt is on to get meat to sustain them through winter. As Charlie looks for a kill, he realizes he's being stalked by a bear. Heimo takes Krin to his best moose territory. Tyler takes to the skies to assess the fire damage.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: Tyler needs to hunt a moose to feed in family. Heimo and Scott race to get the boat off the freezing water. Bob's daughter and ex-wife return to his cab to honor his memory.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: No End in Sight
programme.desc: As winter lurks, isolation from the pandemic pushes Eve to breaking point, and Otto must rescue a friend from sinking into the bay. Later, a menacing bear stalks the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Protect and Preserve
programme.desc: With just seven days to spare, Marty and Matt are determined to build a family the ultimate livestock fort against a pack of unruly coyotes. In the Ozarks, the family joins forces to help a sickly couple living in grave conditions.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier - The Frozen Edge: No End in Sight
programme.desc: As winter lurks, isolation from the pandemic pushes Eve to breaking point, and Otto must rescue a friend from sinking into the bay. Later, a menacing bear stalks the homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Protect and Preserve
programme.desc: With just seven days to spare, Marty and Matt are determined to build a family the ultimate livestock fort against a pack of unruly coyotes. In the Ozarks, the family joins forces to help a sickly couple living in grave conditions.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: The Great Kilcher Quake
programme.desc: A massive earthquake hits Southern Alaska and the Kilcher family scrambles to recover. They fight to re-open vital access roads. Atz Lee races towards his dream of a new remote homestead to aid in recovery, creating waves with his wife, Jane.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Shattered Shelter
programme.desc: Mother Nature continues her onslaught on the Kilcher homestead, using a variety of weapons. Otto, Charlotte, Jane, Bonnie, and August scramble to save a hay barn. Atz Lee and Sr. begin building Atz Lee's new cabin.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Canines
programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Bad Cat Karma
programme.desc: Justin gave his mother a new kitten as a gift, never expecting it would be the gift from hell.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Reptiles of the Lost Continent (Madagascar)
programme.desc: A journey into the forests of Madagascar reveals the varied species of chameleons that have evolved in mysterious ways on this ancient island. Steve locates the smallest and largest of this amazing reptile family.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Never Too Late for Love
programme.desc: Elderly chameleon, Mr. Parsons, has a romantic date with young Daphne from France. It's his last chance to father a child. They first met last year but their rendezvous didn't go well so keepers are hoping for better luck second time around.

programme.title: The Zoo: Porcupine Blind Date
programme.desc: The zoo opens an endangered turtle species facility, while Malayan tigers Suhanna and Rimba struggle to breed, because Rimba seems disinterested. Needles the porcupine gets a new mate, and the Guar herd eagerly await the arrival of new calves.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Nature's Super HQ
programme.desc: Pete and NTS give superhero efforts to build a treehouse for the For-Mar Nature Preserve just outside Flint, MI. The 5-platform 'nature headquarters' will serve as a positive addition to a community still reeling from the water crisis that began in 2014.

programme.title: Tanked!: Dwight Howard's Slithering Slam Dunk
programme.desc: A call from NBA star Dwight Howard sends Brett and Wayde to Houston. But Howard doesn't just want a fish tank, he also wants a new habitat for his two snakes!

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Left for Dead
programme.desc: Tia races to rescue an emaciated puppy chained to an abandoned home. A couple visits VRC in hope of finding a younger sibling for their dog. And a Good Samaritan needs help rescuing a stray mama dog still bleeding three weeks after giving birth.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Treading Water
programme.desc: Tania and Mariah make it their mission to help two puppies diagnosed with swimmer's syndrome take their first steps. Marcel rescues a stray dog trapped beneath a house. And a couple from New York are looking for a companion to share their active lives.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bucks Collide
programme.desc: Game wardens head to a home after getting a call about bucks fighting in Comal County. While patrolling the Brazos River, Kiel responds to a drowning in progress. A trespassing incident quickly turns into a drug case. Putnam hears shots fired nearby.

programme.title: Animal Cribs: Dog Town, USA

programme.title: Movie: Johnson Family Vacation
programme.desc: As the Johnsons head out on their annual family reunion, it becomes a question of survival as Nate Johnson fights with the onboard navigation system, while the rest of the family join the ride very reluctantly.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: The Saint

programme.desc: The peace of an Indiana town is interrupted on Valentine's Day 2003, when police receive a report of a violent murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Patricia Monsell
programme.desc: The murder of a New Jersey entrepreneur leaves investigators stumped... until months later, when a drug bust brings to light a murder plot riddled with greed, addiction, and betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped: Theresa Tolliver
programme.desc: Two young boys are left fatherless when an Air Force sergeant is gunned down by a pair of intruders in his San Antonio home.

programme.title: Movie: Breaking In
programme.desc: While setting her late father's estate in his fortress-like house, a mother is trapped outside when would-be burglars activate the security system and lock the house down. With her children on the inside, she stops at nothing to rescue them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fat Blue Line
programme.desc: During the San Castellanta street festival, much of the town realizes their wallets have been pickpocketed. After the state investigator puts the wrong man in jail, Chief Wiggum sets out to clear his name.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXX
programme.desc: Three stories of horror feature a demon Maggie, a mission to rescue Milhouse from another dimension, dead-Homer's spirit trying on some new bodies for size and Selma finally finding love in an unlikely place: the alien in the basement.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gorillas on the Mast
programme.desc: After a trip to Aquatraz Water Park, Lisa becomes determined to set free Springfield's most vicious animals in captivity. Meanwhile, Homer fulfills a lifelong dream of buying a boat, and quickly realizes boat ownership sucks.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Livin La Pura Vida
programme.desc: The Simpsons join other Springfield families on the Van Houten's annual trip to Costa Rica, which they obviously can't afford. While there, Homer befriends Patty’s new girlfriend, Evelyn.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thanksgiving of Horror
programme.desc: The Simpsons are forced to face various Thanksgiving nightmares, including the first Thanksgiving, an A.I. mishap and a dangerous space mission complicated by a sentient cranberry sauce.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Todd, Todd, Why Hast Thou Forsaken Me?
programme.desc: In this Flanders family-focused episode, Todd blames God for the death of his mother and rejects his faith causing great distress for Ned, who sends him to live with the Simpsons in an attempt to scare him back into God's arms.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bobby, It's Cold Outside
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob gets contracted as this year's Mall Santa. Meanwhile, someone is stealing all the Christmas packages off people's front porches and needs to be tracked down to save Christmas.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hail to the Teeth
programme.desc: Homer and Marge attend Artie Ziff's wedding and become quite uncomfortable when they realize that his bride-to-be is a clone of Marge.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Miseducation of Lisa Simpson
programme.desc: The sea captain finds a treasure he's been searching for all his life, but it's taken from him by the townspeople. Marge convinces the people of Springfield to build a S.T.E.M. school with the money.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart the Bad Guy
programme.desc: Bart accidentally sees a brand-new superhero movie a month before it comes out and the world cowers before his newfound plot-spoiling powers.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Screenless
programme.desc: Marge implements a screen time limit for the whole family, all of whom all easily adjust to the new lifestyle. However, Marge realizes that she is the one addicted not her husband and children.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Better Off Ned
programme.desc: Bart bonds with Ned Flanders, which leaves Homer jealous, so he retaliates by mentoring Nelson Muntz. Then, a heroic act by Homer makes Bart look up to him again.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Gun Fever Too: Still Hot
programme.desc: After Frank appears on local television advocating gun ownership, the rest of the gang takes a look at the ownership process and alternative to find a common ground to the heated issue.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Tries Desperately to Win an Award
programme.desc: Tired of failing to be recognized for their years of service in the bar industry, the gang changes their ways to give the patrons what they think they want.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac and Dennis Buy a Timeshare
programme.desc: The gang does their best to recoup their investments in questionable schemes by dumping their losses on Ben the soldier while trying to avoid being duped again by whatever mastermind is pulling their strings.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Day
programme.desc: The gang gets a day to do what they want while everyone else must participate willingly. This is Mac's Day and it's got twice the 'Mac'.

programme.title: Movie: Welcome to Marwen

programme.title: Movie: Miss Bala
programme.desc: Gloria becomes involved in the dangerous world of cross-border crime. In order to survive, she finds a power she never knew she had. Relying on all of the cunning and strength she can muster, she fights her way out.

programme.title: Movie: Breaking In
programme.desc: While setting her late father's estate in his fortress-like house, a mother is trapped outside when would-be burglars activate the security system and lock the house down. With her children on the inside, she stops at nothing to rescue them.

programme.title: Movie: The Hate U Give
programme.desc: Teenager Starr lives two lives, her home one in a poor and mostly black neighbourhood, and her school life at a rich, mostly white prep school. When she witnesses her friend get fatally shot by a police officer, she becomes torn between her two lives.

programme.title: Law & Order: Kids
programme.desc: An illegal gun market is unearthed after a teenager is killed in a drive-by shooting.

programme.title: Law & Order: Big Bang
programme.desc: A nuclear scientist is suspected of killing his wife with a mail bomb.

programme.title: Law & Order: Mayhem
programme.desc: Logan and Briscoe deal with a heavy caseload during a 24-hour period.

programme.title: Law & Order: Wager
programme.desc: The detectives believe the death of an athlete's father is linked to gambling debts.

programme.title: Law & Order: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A fatal hit-and-run of a young African-American boy threatens to trigger racial riots.

programme.title: Law & Order: Nurture
programme.desc: The search for a missing ten-year-old girl puts police on the trail of a poetry teacher.

programme.title: Law & Order: Doubles
programme.desc: An obsessed fan is suspected in the attack on a famous tennis player.

programme.title: Movie: Goldfinger
programme.desc: James Bond must prevent an international gold dealer from ruining Fort Knox's gold reserve.

programme.title: Movie: From Russia With Love
programme.desc: Bond is sent to Istanbul to steal a Russian decoding machine and ends up in a trap.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Profit and Lace
programme.desc: Quark is reunited with love of his life and is willing to sacrifice everything for her.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Time's Orphan
programme.desc: An accident turns O'Brien's eight year old daughter into a wild eighteen year old.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: The Sound of Her Voice
programme.desc: The Defiant crew encounter a distress call from a Starfleet Captain stranded on a planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Tears of the Prophets
programme.desc: The Federation joins with Klingons and Romulans in a concerted attack on Cardassia.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Image in the Sand
programme.desc: Acting Commanding CL. Kira finds out from Ross that Romulans will set up a station office.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: Shadows and Symbols
programme.desc: Sisko meets Ezri, the new host of the Dax symbiont, before departing Earth for Tyree.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine: After Image
programme.desc: Ezri accepts the position of counsellor to help Garak overcome his fear of claustrophobia.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Remember Me
programme.desc: Wesley's experiment with warp fields results in the mysterious disappearance of the crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Legacy
programme.desc: A mission leads the crew to Tasha Yar's birthplace, where they encounter her sister.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Reunion
programme.desc: Picard is chosen to mediate a Klingon power struggle by the poisoned Emperor.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Future Imperfect
programme.desc: Riker awakens to discover 16 years have passed and he now commands the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Final Mission

programme.desc: Alaskans race against the onset of winter to prepare for the cold and dark months ahead.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Other Side

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Into the Night

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Bone Cold
programme.desc: In the heart of winter, Alaskans face deadly temperatures in their quest for survival.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Man Down

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Bloodlines
programme.desc: The Hailstone family must rely on one other to survive the Alaskan tundra.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Bare Bones
programme.desc: As a pandemic sweeps the globe, Alaskans face strange times in daylight’s return.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: The Big Catch
programme.desc: Amid the long days of the arctic summer, Alaskans learn valuable lessons of survival.

programme.title: Inside the Afghanistan War

programme.title: Inside the Iraq War
programme.desc: We travel to worn-torn Iraq for an in-depth look at the grim reality of the last six years with harrowing personal accounts from the brave men and women who are living through it.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Bear Necessities
programme.desc: It’s spring at ZooTampa, and the animals are emerging from hibernation.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: One Way or the Otter
programme.desc: Baby fever takes over ZooTampa as the penguin keepers are on egg watch.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Hungry, Hungry Dragons
programme.desc: Walter, a Florida panther, is getting a thorough exam after getting caught in a snare.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: You're the Rhino I Want!
